narrative:
Springfield Township has 8,920 registered voters, with 54.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.7 percentage points.
